Video.summary: A West Point graduate has trouble adjusting to an Army unit in the West.
Video.title: Lieutenant Bungle

Video.summary: Ex-outlaw Belle Starr goes after the D.A. who ridiculed her illiterate husband.
Video.title: A Bullet for the D.A.

Video.summary: A mine cave-in alters a rivalry between two men over the affections of a woman.
Video.title: The Watch

Video.summary: John Wesley Hardin's efforts to hide his past are threatened when an old gang member comes to town.
Video.title: Preacher with a Past

Video.summary: Abel Duncan is dying, and his last request is for an ordained minister to preside over his funeral.
Video.title: Abel Duncan's Dying Wish

Video.summary: The story of Amadeo Giannini and the creation of the Bank of America.
Video.title: The Unshakable Man

Video.summary: Sante Fe faces an invasion by the American army and it's citizens are forced south.
Video.title: La Tules

Video.summary: A princess agrees to be treated by a medical pioneer who uses a new method: blood transfusion.
Video.title: Bloodline

Video.summary: Unable to come to terms, a U.S. senator and a Supreme Court justice agree to a duel.
Video.title: A Gun Is Not a Gentleman

Image.alt: A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman

Video.summary: Diamond Jim Brady is traveling through Texas by railroad and waging wild bets along the way.
Video.title: Diamond Jim Brady

Video.summary: A father who raised a cold-hearted killer worries his younger son may turn out the same way.
Video.title: Deadly Decision

Video.summary: The Dalton brothers stage simultaneous robberies of two banks in Coffeyville.
Video.title: Three Minutes to Eternity

Video.summary: Winfield Stratton finds gold just after selling his mining claim to a syndicate.
Video.title: Sixty-Seven Miles of Gold

Video.summary: As survivors of the Donner Party recuperate, William Eddy grieves the loss of his wife and children.
Video.title: The Hastings Cut-off

Video.summary: John Wheeler is going to even the odds in a fight between meek Arkie Monson and a gunslinger.
Video.title: The Bigger They Are

Video.summary: Stephen Austin travels with his companion Valdez to purchase land in the Mexican territory of Texas.
Video.title: A Book of Spanish Grammar

Video.summary: When Doc Holliday shoots a man who cheated him at cards, he becomes a target himself.
Video.title: The Quiet and the Fury

Video.summary: A down-and-out cowboy pines after a wealthy rancher's daughter.
Video.title: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Image.alt: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Video.summary: Mary likes the attention of many men, but that causes trouble when one is murdered over her.
Video.title: Queen of Spades

Video.summary: A man who claims he can resurrect the dead poses a problem for killer Bill Groat.
Video.title: Miracle at Boot Hill

Video.summary: A father outsmarts a wily Indian.
Video.title: The Lucky Cow

Video.summary: A charlatan rainmaker sparks a range war.
Video.title: Big John and the Rainmaker

Video.summary: A kindhearted saloon singer nurses a gunfighter back to health.
Video.title: The Left Hand Is Damned

Video.summary: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.
Video.title: Tribute to the Dog

Video.summary: A bear hunter and his daughters nurse an injured Easterner back to health.
Video.title: Peter the Hunter

Video.summary: A former Confederate officer tries to help the family of a soldier killed in battle.
Video.title: Paid in Full

Video.summary: Two newspaper editors compete for the right to publish Denver's first newspaper.
Video.title: The Race at Cherry Creek

Video.summary: A crew of mine developers ingeniously races against time to make it from Arizona to San Diego.
Video.title: A City Is Born

Video.summary: Mormon emigrant Jessica Scott loses her baby in unknown territory while traveling to Utah.
Video.title: The Red Shawl

Video.summary: A woman whose house is hit by a meteorite decides to sue God for damages.
Video.title: Canary Harris vs. the Almighty

Video.summary: In a brawling frontier town, Sister Blandina tries to stop a hanging.
Video.title: The Fastest Nun in the West

Image.alt: The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West

Video.summary: Sailor William Richardson falls in love with the Mexican comandante's daughter.
Video.title: The Water Bringer

Video.summary: A grizzled trail guide is retained to lead a dangerous trek through Native country.
Video.title: Hugh Glass Meets the Bear

Video.summary: California's ex-governor stops a war.
Video.title: The Firebrand

Video.summary: A society woman takes over a wagon train when the wagon master is killed in a raid.
Video.title: Lady of the Plains

Video.summary: A priest claims the marriages in a town are void.
Video.title: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Image.alt: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Video.summary: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured hero to lure tourists into his dying town.
Video.title: The Resurrection of Deadwood Dick

Video.summary: After a settler's son is taken during an Apache raid, an Army doctor leads a small band for rescue.
Video.title: The Hero of Apache Pass

Video.summary: Opportunist Monte Dunning uses the predictions of a fortune teller to intimidate his fellow miners.
Video.title: The Gypsy

Video.summary: A widowed magician saves his young apprentice.
Video.title: The Saga of Dr. Davis

Video.summary: A four-dollar lawsuit is brought against an insurance company by a farmer who claims he was cheated.
Video.title: The Four-Dollar Law Suit

Video.summary: A sheriff pursues deadly gunslinger Sam Bolt and finds an unlikely ally in one of Bolt's partners.
Video.title: Brute Angel

Video.summary: A psychic leads the way to rescue ambush survivors.
Video.title: The Man Who Wouldn't Die
